name: CRISPY TEFF and GRIT CAKES with EGGPLANT, TOMATOES, and PEANUTS

ingredients.item: 4 cups vegetable stock, homemade or store-bought
ingredients.original: 4 cups vegetable stock, homemade or store-bought

ingredients.item: 1½ pounds globe eggplant, peeled and cut into ½-inch pieces
ingredients.original: 1½ pounds globe eggplant, peeled and cut into ½-inch pieces

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon plus ¼ teaspoon coarse sea salt
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon plus ¼ teaspoon coarse sea salt

ingredients.item: ½ cup finely diced red onion
ingredients.original: ½ cup finely diced red onion

ingredients.item: ¾ teaspoon cumin seeds, toasted and ground
ingredients.original: ¾ teaspoon cumin seeds, toasted and ground

ingredients.item: ½ teaspoon coriander seeds, toasted and ground
ingredients.original: ½ teaspoon coriander seeds, toasted and ground

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil, plus more for frying
ingredients.original: 2 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil, plus more for frying

ingredients.item: 2 pounds heirloom tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and finely diced
ingredients.original: 2 pounds heirloom tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and finely diced

ingredients.item: ½ teaspoon freshly squeezed lemon juice
ingredients.original: ½ teaspoon freshly squeezed lemon juice
